parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: When 'On' data is captured from the ZED camera.

parameters.name: zedtop
parameters.label: ZED TOP
parameters.description: The name of the primary that is configuring the camera. The primary controls which camera the receives data from.

parameters.name: cameratransform
parameters.label: Camera Transform
parameters.description: Enables transformation, which returns the position and rotation of the camera.

parameters.name: resetcameratransform
parameters.label: Camera Transform
parameters.description: Zeros out the current camera position, effectively makes the current position the new origin.

parameters.name: planeorientation
parameters.label: Plane Orientation
parameters.description: Enables plane at point, which returns the position of the plane corresponding the UV coordinate.

parameters.name: getplane
parameters.label: Get Plane
parameters.description: Returns the camera position relative to the initial position of the camera. A , , triplet of channels will be output for the position of the camera in meters. An , , triplet will be output for the ori

parameters.name: getplanepulse
parameters.label: Pulse
parameters.description: Instantly returns the camera position relative to the initial position of the camera.

parameters.name: planereferenceframe
parameters.label: Plane Reference Frame
parameters.description: Controls if the panel coordinates will be given relative to the camera or the world.

parameters.name: planepointu
parameters.label: Plane Point U
parameters.description: Sets the U coordinate of the point in the image to extract plane position.

parameters.name: planepointv
parameters.label: Plane Point V
parameters.description: Sets the V coordinate of the point in the image to extract plane position.

parameters.name: planeposition
parameters.label: Plane Position
parameters.description: Returns , , and position channels of the center of the plane.

parameters.name: planerotation
parameters.label: Plane Rotation
parameters.description: Returns , , and rotation channels for the plane.

parameters.name: planenormal
parameters.label: Plane Normal
parameters.description: Returns , , and normal channels of the plane.

parameters.name: planesize
parameters.label: Plane Size
parameters.description: Returns size of the bounding rectangle of the plane.

parameters.name: bodytracking
parameters.label: Body Tracking
parameters.description: Body tracking allows for tracking human skeletons that are found in the video frame. Each mode uses an AI model that will need to be trained one for your . This will take several minutes, but only nee

parameters.name: maxbodies
parameters.label: Max Bodies
parameters.description: The maximum number of bodies that will be tracked.

parameters.name: body3d
parameters.label: Body 3D
parameters.description: Enable to output 3D positions. Rotations will be included if the Joint Mode is set to 'Relative'.

parameters.name: jointmode
parameters.label: Joint Mode
parameters.description: Controls if the joint values are given in absolute in scene or relative to each other.

parameters.name: body2d
parameters.label: Body 2D
parameters.description: 2D normalized UV coordinates for each joint, giving their position within the image.

parameters.name: aspectcorrectuv
parameters.label: Aspect Correct UVs
parameters.description: Corrects the UV coordinate using the aspect ratio. For a 2x1 aspect ratio, a normalized coordinate of (0.25, 0.25) will cover a quarter of the width and an eighth of the height, not a quarter of the h

parameters.name: boundingboxes
parameters.label: Bounding Boxes
parameters.description: Enable bounding boxes. Head bounding box is only enabled when Body 3D is enabled.

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page.

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).
